notes: These sources are real observational or archival products and should stay separate from synthetic benchmark pipelines.
Use evidence-only ingestion by default until instrument-level and survey-level review logic is in place.
Roman and Rubin should only be treated as real observational archives once their official public survey products are available.

archives.name: mast_jwst_hst
archives.description: Real JWST and HST observation metadata through STScI MAST.
archives.command_template: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe mast_snapshot_importer.py --target <target_name> --collections JWST,HST --radius-deg 0.05 --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest --evidence-only

archives.name: gaia_dr3
archives.description: Real astrometry and stellar kinematics from Gaia DR3.

archives.name: sdss_dr18
archives.description: Real optical imaging and spectroscopy through SDSS SkyServer.
archives.command_template: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe sdss_snapshot_importer.py --ra-center <ra_deg> --dec-center <dec_deg> --radius-arcmin 60 --max-results 50 --object-type galaxy --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest --evidence-only

archives.name: gaia_sdss_crossmatch
archives.description: Deterministic Gaia DR3 × SDSS DR18 cross-match anomaly triage from governed structured bundles.

archives.name: gaia_panstarrs_crossmatch
archives.description: Deterministic Gaia DR3 × Pan-STARRS DR2 cross-match anomaly triage from governed structured bundles.

archives.name: panstarrs_mast
archives.description: Pan-STARRS wide-field catalog access through MAST catalog services.

archives.name: ztf_irsa
archives.description: Real time-domain survey data through IRSA and ZTF services.
archives.command_template: d:/Manatuabon/.venv/Scripts/python.exe ztf_snapshot_importer.py --ra-center <ra_deg> --dec-center <dec_deg> --size-deg 0.1 --max-results 50 --intersect OVERLAPS --inbox D:/Manatuabon/data --db D:/Manatuabon/manatuabon.db --agent-log D:/Manatuabon/agent_log.json --ingest --evidence-only

archives.name: gaia_ztf_crossmatch
archives.description: Deterministic Gaia DR3 × ZTF cross-match follow-up triage from governed structured bundles.

archives.name: roman_official_archive
archives.description: Use official Roman mission archive only when public survey products are released.

archives.name: rubin_official_archive
archives.description: Use official Rubin data-release portals for real survey products.
